zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybil de Falaise於大約1075年出生在英國德比夏爾時，她的父親William de Falaise26歲，母親Geva de Burcy20歲。她和Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1122年7月12日在蘇格蘭享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sybil de Falaise于大约1075年出生在英国德比夏爾时，她的父亲William de Falaise26岁，母亲Geva de Burcy20岁。她和Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1122年7月12日在苏格兰享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sybil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla

It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Sybil de Falaise was born about 1075, in Derbyshire, England, her father, William de Falaise, was 26 and her mother, Geva de Burcy, was 20. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery. She died on 12 July 1122, in Scotland, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sybil de Falaise est née environ 1075, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Falaise, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Geva de Burcy, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery. Elle est décédée le 12 juillet 1122, à Écosse, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sybil de Falaise um 1075 in Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Falaise 26 und ihre Mutter Geva de Burcy 20. Sie hatte mit Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Juli 1122 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sybil de Falaise è nata il circa 1075 nel Derbyshire, England, sua padre, William de Falaise, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Geva de Burcy, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery. Morì il 12 luglio 1122, nel Scotland, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sybil de Falaiseが約1075年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父William de Falaiseは26歳，母Geva de Burcyは20歳であった。彼女はBaudouin de Boulers de Montgomeryとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1122年7月12日にスコットランドで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybil de Falaise(이)가 대략 1075년 영국 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Falaise(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Geva de Burcy(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1122년 7월 12일 스컷랜드에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

Bro an Hañv, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sybil de Falaise nasceu aproximadamente 1075, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Falaise, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Geva de Burcy, tinha 20 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery. Ela faleceu em 12 de julho de 1122, em Scotland, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybil de Falaise родилась около 1075 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Falaise было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Geva de Burcy, 20. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery. Она умерла 12 июля 1122 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sybil de Falaise nació aproximadamente 1075, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Falaise, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Geva de Burcy, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Baudouin de Boulers de Montgomery. Murió el 12 de julio de 1122, en Scotland, a la edad de 48 años.
